response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: No vocals are present in this credit scroll/medley video, so the lyrics/vocals from the reference JSON are not applicable.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used to identify the nature of the video (credits roll), and manual translation was applied to the prominent on-screen greeting card at the end of the video.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the prominent final text card to its full on-screen duration from 03:28.000 to the end of the video.
